'''hamazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachstand|coachstand]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachstand|coachstand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hamazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmæzhæth|hæmæzhæth]] || [[word:hæmæzhæj|hæmæzhæj]] || [[word:hæmæzhæsh|hæmæzhæsh]] || [[word:hæmæzhæ|hæmæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamamazhath|hamamazhath]] || [[word:hamamazhaj|hamamazhaj]] || [[word:hamamazhash|hamamazhash]] || [[word:hamamazha|hamamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamazhath|hamazhath]] || [[word:hamazhaj|hamazhaj]] || [[word:hamazhash|hamazhash]] || [[word:hamazha|hamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamafzhath|hamafzhath]] || [[word:hamafzhaj|hamafzhaj]] || [[word:hamafzhash|hamafzhash]] || [[word:hamafzhaf|hamafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamazhatha|hamazhatha]] || [[word:hamazhaja|hamazhaja]] || [[word:hamazhasha|hamazhasha]] || [[word:hamazhaka|hamazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamazhath|hamazhath]] || [[word:hamazhaj|hamazhaj]] || [[word:hamazhash|hamazhash]] || [[word:hamazha|hamazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamazhathal|hamazhathal]] || [[word:hamazhajal|hamazhajal]] || [[word:hamazhashal|hamazhashal]] || [[word:hamazhakal|hamazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamazhathatha|hamazhathatha]] || [[word:hamazhajaja|hamazhajaja]] || [[word:hamazhashasha|hamazhashasha]] || [[word:hamazhaka|hamazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamazhathan|hamazhathan]] || [[word:hamazhajan|hamazhajan]] || [[word:hamazhashan|hamazhashan]] || [[word:hamazhakan|hamazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamazhathaoro|hamazhathaoro]] || [[word:hamazhajaoro|hamazhajaoro]] || [[word:hamazhashaoro|hamazhashaoro]] || [[word:hamazhakaoro|hamazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
